name: Mass Concrete Calculator
desc: Calculate cement, sand and gravel for mass concrete.
seo_title: Mass Concrete Calculator - Volume, Cement Bags & Gravel
seo_description: Calculate cement, sand and gravel for mass concrete slabs. Free tool for foundations and construction projects. Instant results.
example_label: Calculate concrete needed for a foundation slab 5m long by 3m wide with 20cm thickness.

range_hints.largo: Typical range: 3–10 m for residential slabs
range_hints.ancho: Typical range: 2–5 m for residential slabs
range_hints.espesor: Minimum 0.15 m for light loads, 0.20–0.30 m for standard loads

result_context: The calculated volume of {volumen} m³ requires {cemento_sacos} bags of cement, {arena_m3} m³ of sand and {grava_m3} m³ of gravel for a standard strength mix.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Width x Thickness
steps: Calculate materials: 3m³ × 7 bags/m³ = 21 bags of cement
mistakes: Using insufficient thickness (less than 15cm) which can cause cracking under load
Not accounting for 5-10% waste from spills and leveling
Confusing cubic meters with square meters when ordering concrete
description: Calculate cement, sand and gravel for mass concrete.
